elements.description: Antique terracotta drainage pipe section, hand-thrown with visible finger marks. Likely 19th century from southern France. Excellent patina with moss residue on exterior.
elements.provenance_seller_text: Trouvé dans une démolition d'une ancienne ferme près de Carcassonne. Le tuyau faisait partie du système de drainage original, probablement installé vers 1870.
elements.negotiation_log:
Béatrice: Bonjour, je suis intéressée par le tuyau en terre cuite. Est-il possible de voir des photos supplémentaires du diamètre intérieur?
Seller: Oui bien sûr, je vous envoie ça ce soir.
Seller: [photos envoyées]
Béatrice: Merci! Le diamètre est parfait. Seriez-vous ouvert à 35€ étant donné que je prends en charge les frais de port?
Seller: D'accord pour 35€. Je peux l'emballer demain.
Béatrice: Parfait, merci beaucoup!
elements.agent_notes: Excellent condition for age. Finger marks confirm hand-thrown origin. Fire classification RF1. No structural concerns.

elements.description: Heavy copper busbar section from decommissioned electrical switchgear. Beautiful green patina. Industrial markings still legible: 'ABB 1987 630A'.
elements.provenance_seller_text: Kommt aus dem Rückbau eines Umspannwerks in Brandenburg. Baujahr 1987, wurde 2024 stillgelegt. Alles ordnungsgemäß dokumentiert.
elements.negotiation_log:
Béatrice: Guten Tag, ich interessiere mich für die Kupfer-Sammelschiene. Können Sie mir die genauen Maße und das Gewicht mitteilen?
Seller: Hallo! Die Schiene ist ca. 24cm x 20cm, wiegt etwa 4.2kg. Reines Kupfer.
Béatrice: Sehr schön. Hätten Sie eventuell noch die Dokumentation vom Rückbau? Für unser Projekt ist die Herkunft wichtig.
Seller: Ja, ich kann Ihnen den Rückbauschein als PDF schicken.
Béatrice: Wunderbar. Wäre 95€ für Sie akzeptabel? Wir übernehmen selbstverständlich den Versand.
Seller: Bei 95€ bin ich dabei. Versand geht morgen raus.
elements.agent_notes: Verified copper content from decommissioning certificate. Weight suggests solid bar, not hollow. Patina is genuine atmospheric oxidation. RF1 confirmed.

elements.description: Dell PowerEdge R720 server motherboard. Complete with heatsinks and RAM slots. Complex green PCB with gold-plated connectors. A relic of the cloud era.
elements.provenance_seller_text: From a data center in Amsterdam that was decommissioned last year. These servers ran cloud services for about 8 years before end of life.
elements.negotiation_log:
Béatrice: Hi, I'm interested in the Dell R720 motherboard. Is the board complete with all components?
Seller: Yes, all original components still attached. I have about 50 of these if you need more.
Béatrice: Interesting! For now I need just one. Could you do 18€?
Seller: I can do 20€, that's my lowest.
elements.agent_notes: RF3 material - must be placed in Zone 1 or encapsulated. Portland mortar encapsulation recommended for higher placement. Currently negotiating final price.

elements.description: Aerogel insulation blanket offcut from aerospace manufacturing. Aspen Aerogels Pyrogel XT. Extraordinary thermal performance, translucent blue-white appearance.
elements.provenance_seller_text: Produktionsüberschuss aus der Luftfahrtindustrie. Pyrogel XT von Aspen Aerogels, Restposten aus einer Isolierungsauftrag für Airbus.
elements.negotiation_log:
Béatrice: Hallo, ich interessiere mich für das Aerogel-Blanket. Haben Sie ein Materialdatenblatt (MDS) verfügbar?
Seller: Ja, ich sende Ihnen das originale Datenblatt von Aspen Aerogels.
Seller: [PDF attached - Pyrogel XT Technical Data Sheet]
elements.agent_notes: FLAGGED FOR ARCHITECT REVIEW: Aerogel blanket needs MDS verification for fire classification. Seller claims RF1 based on Pyrogel XT specs (rated to 650°C). Price is high but material is extraordinary. Depth is only 30mm - well within slot tolerance but very thin. Visual impact could be remarkable - translucent quality unlike anything else in the wall.

elements.description: Collection of 12 hand-painted Portuguese azulejo tile fragments. Blue and white traditional patterns, various sizes. Some show beautiful craquelure.
elements.provenance_seller_text: Estes azulejos foram recuperados durante a renovação de um edifício no Bairro Alto, Lisboa. São do século XIX, padrão tradicional português.
elements.negotiation_log:
Béatrice: Olá, estou interessada nos fragmentos de azulejo. Poderia confirmar que são peças originais do século XIX?
Seller: Sim, são originais. Foram retirados com cuidado durante a obra. Posso enviar mais fotos dos detalhes.
Béatrice: Perfeito, obrigada. Poderia fazer por 50€? Pagaremos o envio.
Seller: Sim, 50€ está bem. Embalo com muito cuidado por causa da fragilidade.
elements.agent_notes: Beautiful fragments with genuine age patina. Craquelure pattern confirms 19th century origin. RF1 as ceramic. Seller is shipping with extensive padding - fragile items. Tracking number received.
